signInSubtitle: Sign in to manage appointments, patients, and clinic operations

forgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot Password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPasswordPage.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. The link will expire in 60 minutes.
forgotPasswordPage.error: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.

resetPasswordPage.title: Set New Password
resetPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password
resetPasswordPage.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPasswordPage.errorInvalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPasswordPage.errorGeneric: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Register Your Clinic
register.subtitle: Try free for 14 days. No credit card required.
register.slugTaken: This URL is taken. Please choose another one.
register.successSubtitle: Your 14-day trial has started. Redirecting to the login page...

errors.slugTaken: This URL is already in use. Please choose another one.

register.verifyEmailNotice: A verification link has been sent to your email address. Please check your email to activate your account.

emailNotVerified.title: Email not verified
emailNotVerified.message: Please verify your email address before logging in.

verifyEmailPage.successMessage: Your email address has been verified. You can now sign in.
verifyEmailPage.errorUsed: This verification link has already been used.
verifyEmailPage.errorExpired: This verification link has expired. Please request a new one.

resendVerificationPage.title: Resend Verification Email
resendVerificationPage.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a new verification link.
resendVerificationPage.successMessage: If an unverified account with that email exists, a verification link has been sent.
